title: Pitch Patrol
short_description: Maestro Owl plays two notes — use your ears to tell if the second one is higher or lower!
description: Maestro Owl is training your ears! Press PLAY to hear two notes, then use your ears to answer: is the second note HIGHER or LOWER than the first? It's real ear training — the very first musical skill — built on pure musical tones. Younger players hear big, obvious jumps; older players face smaller and smaller steps, and in golden-ears mode a sneaky third choice appears: the two notes might be exactly the SAME. Listen closely, patrol! A free online pitch, listening and ear-training game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Press PLAY to hear the notes, then tap Higher, Lower (or Same). Sound on!
